refresh_rationale: 0.9.0-M1 native-backend performance optimizations applied: (1) JSON encode_string replaced char-by-char iteration with byte-level bulk-copy ASCII fast path + pre-reserved output buffer; (2) JSON integer number encoding avoids heap allocation for whole-number f64 values; (3) NativeVm route segment cache pre-computes split_path results at construction time, eliminating per-request path splitting in match_route; (4) NativeHeap collect_garbage now skips mark-and-sweep when alloc_count is zero, eliminating GC overhead on non-allocating call sites. HTTP request latency regression budgets tightened for get_notes and post_valid to reflect expected improvement on those paths. Baseline ms values retained from 0.8.0 measurement; will be refreshed after post-M1 benchmark run.
notes: M1 threshold tightening: request_get_notes max_regression_ms reduced 8 -> 6, request_post_valid max_regression_ms reduced 25 -> 18. Other metrics unchanged pending post-optimization bench capture.
